verdicts.title: Web Connectors OAuth surface is a permanent stub
verdicts.note: connectors/routes.py:303-306,333-338,557-567 returns https://auth.example stub / 503; app.state.connector_oauth_start|callback never set in src (grep) and write_through_from_mcp only called in tests.

verdicts.title: All destination stores are in-memory in every shipped composition
verdicts.note: No Postgres*Store class exists for todos/inbox/routines/connectors/webhooks/projects/library/memory/agents/tools/palette (grep); desktop_app.py:157-171 lists all as in-memory 'accepted desktop-v1 gap'; Dockerfile:31 boots app:app in-memory.

verdicts.title: Six near-identical SSE stacks; three have no producer
verdicts.note: inbox/memory/tools/connectors/home/team sse.py total 2438 LOC each re-implementing deque+asyncio.Condition bus+LastEventIdResolver (inbox/sse.py:14 'copy of the home SSE discipline'); .publish() only in inbox/memory/team so tools/connectors/home buses have no producer.

verdicts.title: agents/installs.py (1058 LOC) never mounted
verdicts.note: register_agent_install_routes (installs.py:652) called only by tests/test_agent_installs_routes.py:154, never in app.py/desktop_app.py; facade agents_routes.py proxies only list/get/create/patch/delete, no install endpoints.

verdicts.title: Palette read model has no writers
verdicts.note: upsert_entry/delete_entry have zero callers outside palette/ (grep); PaletteRefreshDispatcher stashed at app.py:1926-1927 but never consumed; only test-side PaletteEntry constructors exist.

verdicts.title: notifications/dispatcher_gate.py is test-only dead code
verdicts.note: dispatcher_gate.py (260 LOC) has exactly one repo-wide reference — tests/test_notification_dispatcher_gate.py:10; no src/ai-backend/facade consumer.

verdicts.title: Per-destination CRUD scaffolding copy-pasted; 14 _ADMIN_ROLES copies
verdicts.note: _ADMIN_ROLES = frozenset({"admin","owner"}) defined verbatim in exactly 14 files; _safe_dump duplicated across 7 service.py files (grep).

verdicts.title: Todo recurrence grammar implemented twice across services
verdicts.note: RecurrenceRuleEvaluator (FREQ/BYDAY/INTERVAL RFC-5545 subset) in backend todos/service.py:86 and ai-backend todo_recurrence_materializer.py:94; no shared contract/fixture in packages/service-contracts (grep exit=1).

verdicts.title: Two-tier layering: settings routes carry business logic at route layer
verdicts.note: LOW severity accepted as-is per verification policy.

verdicts.title: Three hand-maintained duplicate fact sets (todos DDL, HMAC constants, connector slugs)
verdicts.note: LOW severity accepted as-is per verification policy.

verdicts.title: create_app 2049-line composition root with private reach-ins
verdicts.note: LOW severity accepted as-is per verification policy.

verdicts.title: runtime policies route returns decrypted BYOK keys over HTTP
verdicts.note: LOW severity accepted as-is per verification policy.

verdicts.title: WebhookRotationWorker has no launcher
verdicts.note: LOW severity accepted as-is per verification policy.
